hero-title: Think with it, with your own hands — not just look at it
Think with it, not at it
Think with it, not at it
Think with it, not at it
hero-lede: An explorable is a little model you get to work yourself. Every number — the ones on the chart and even the ones in the sentences — is a handle you can take hold of. Drag a handle, and the whole thing thinks itself through again, right in front of you. The understanding isn't something you read off the page; it's something you reach by playing with it.

An explorable is a model you operate. Every number — on the chart and in the sentence — is a handle: drag it and the whole thing re-reasons in front of you. You reach the understanding by playing with it, not by reading.
